response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title "BLUE CLAPPER" and the producer "PandaBoy" from on-screen text. Performed a search with query '"BLUE CLAPPER" PandaBoy Japanese and English lyrics'. Successfully retrieved both original Japanese lyrics and English translations from established lyric databases. Performed scene mapping based on the transition from dialogue to musical performance.
response.global_summary: A 3D stage performance by the Hololive English VTuber group "Justice," which begins with brief dialogue followed by a full-length performance of the song "BLUE CLAPPER" (PandaBoy remix).

scenes.description: Characters interacting on stage with dialogue; no vocal singing occurs during this intro.
The four characters perform "BLUE CLAPPER" on stage, accompanied by light effects and an audience. Title/credit text is displayed on-screen.
